name: Hari Kondabolu
bio: Hari Kondabolu is an American stand-up comedian and writer whose comedy addresses race, inequality, and stereotypes of South Asians. A former writer for Totally Biased with W. Kamau Bell, he released the albums Waiting for 2042 and Mainstream American Comic and the 2018 Netflix special Warn Your Relatives. He also created the 2017 documentary The Problem with Apu.

timeline.ev: Earns a masters in human rights from the London School of Economics
Debut album Waiting for 2042 released on Kill Rock Stars
Creates and stars in The Problem with Apu
Netflix special Warn Your Relatives premieres

accolades: Called one of the most exciting political comics in stand-up by The New York Times
Mainstream American Comic debuted at number one on the iTunes comedy chart
Panelist on NPRs Wait Wait Dont Tell Me since 2017

bits.t: When People Ask Where Youre Really From
Why Does the Devil Need an Advocate?
